summary: Completed testing of FeeManagement component in client detail view (scheda cliente). Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified - IVA/IGIC tax calculation, recurring status, reference month/year, real-time preview working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FeeManagement.jsx component is well-structured with all required fields for IVA/IGIC management
Real-time tax preview calculation working correctly (Netto + Imposta = Lordo)
All 4 tax types supported: ESENTE (0%), IGIC 7%, IVA 21%, IVA 22%
Recurring fee checkbox and status properly integrated
data-testid attributes present on key form elements for testing
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test fee 'Test IGIC 7% Consulenza' during UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: FeeManagement component in client detail view fully tested. Features: IVA/IGIC tax types (ESENTE, IGIC_7, IVA_21, IVA_22), real-time preview calculation, recurring status, reference month/year. Client 'francesco de liso' (ID: 4823240b-c633-48c6-916e-b62636aacfe8) has one existing fee with IVA_22.

backend_api.GET /api/clients/{id}/fees: ✓ Returns client fees with tax fields
backend_api.POST /api/clients/{id}/fees with IGIC_7: ✓ Creates fee with correct tax calculation (200 * 0.07 = 14, gross = 214)
backend_api.POST /api/clients/{id}/fees with IVA_21: ✓ Creates fee with correct tax calculation (200 * 0.21 = 42, gross = 242)
backend_api.POST /api/clients/{id}/fees with IVA_22: ✓ Creates fee with correct tax calculation (500 * 0.22 = 110, gross = 610)
backend_api.POST /api/clients/{id}/fees recurring: ✓ Creates recurring fee with is_recurring=true, status=recurring
backend_api.PUT /api/clients/{id}/fees/{id}: ✓ Updates fee status to paid, sets paid_date automatically

frontend_ui.Summary cards (4): ✓ Totale Pagato, Da Incassare, Totale, Onorari count
frontend_ui.Form fields: ✓ Tipo Onorario, Descrizione, Importo Netto, Regime Fiscale, Mese/Anno Riferimento, Stato Pagamento, Ricorrente checkbox, Note
frontend_ui.Tax type dropdown: ✓ Shows all 4 options: Esente IVA (0%), IGIC 7%, IVA 21%, IVA 22%
frontend_ui.Real-time preview: ✓ Shows Netto, Imposta, Totale Lordo with correct calculations
frontend_ui.Fee creation: ✓ Creates fee and shows toast 'Onorario creato'
frontend_ui.Fee display: ✓ Shows gross amount, net + tax breakdown, badges for type/status/recurring
